ariaGame.name: Game region label
ariaGame.description: Screen-reader label for the whole play area; explains the goal and controls.

start.name: Start prompt
start.description: Overlay prompt shown before the first launch, telling the visitor how to begin.

hudWave.name: HUD wave counter
hudWave.description: HUD label showing the current wave number.

hudScore.name: HUD score counter
hudScore.description: HUD label showing the current score.

hudShield.name: HUD shield counter
hudShield.description: HUD label showing the remaining shield strength.

announceWave.name: Announcer: wave start
announceWave.description: Live-region message when a new wave begins, with the wave number and how many drones are coming.

announceShield.name: Announcer: shield remaining
announceShield.description: Live-region message after a hit, with the remaining shield strength.

announceWin.name: Announcer: verified
announceWin.description: Live-region message when every wave is cleared and the captcha is satisfied.

announceLose.name: Announcer: round over
announceLose.description: Live-region message when the shield is depleted and the round ends.

win.name: Verified screen title
win.description: End-screen headline shown when all waves are cleared and the captcha is satisfied.

lose.name: Round over title
lose.description: End-screen headline shown when the shield is depleted.

mute.name: Mute button
mute.description: Label/aria-label for the control that mutes game audio.

unmute.name: Unmute button
unmute.description: Label/aria-label for the control that unmutes game audio.

pulse.name: Pulse ability button
pulse.description: Label/aria-label for the special energy-burst ability the pilot can trigger.

English.ariaGame: Voidshot arena shooter. Pilot your drone toward the cursor; the guns aim and fire automatically. Clear every wave of drones before your shield is depleted.
English.start: Tap or press any key to launch

Chinese (Simplified).ariaGame: Voidshot 竞技场射击。操控你的无人机朝光标移动，炮塔会自动瞄准并开火。在护盾耗尽前清除每一波无人机。
Chinese (Simplified).announceWave: 第 {n} 波：{count} 架无人机来袭
Chinese (Simplified).announceWin: 已通过。所有波次已清除。

Spanish.ariaGame: Voidshot, disparos en arena. Pilota tu dron hacia el cursor; los cañones apuntan y disparan solos. Despeja cada oleada de drones antes de que se agote tu escudo.
Spanish.start: Toca o pulsa cualquier tecla para despegar

Arabic.ariaGame: Voidshot، إطلاق نار في الساحة. وجّه طائرتك المسيّرة نحو المؤشر؛ المدافع تصوّب وتطلق النار تلقائيًا. أنهِ كل موجة من الطائرات قبل نفاد درعك.
Arabic.start: انقر أو اضغط أي مفتاح للانطلاق
Arabic.announceWin: تم التحقق. تم إنهاء كل الموجات.

Portuguese.ariaGame: Voidshot, tiro em arena. Pilote seu drone em direção ao cursor; os canhões miram e disparam sozinhos. Limpe cada onda de drones antes que seu escudo acabe.
Portuguese.start: Toque ou pressione qualquer tecla para decolar

French.ariaGame: Voidshot, tir en arène. Pilotez votre drone vers le curseur; les canons visent et tirent tout seuls. Éliminez chaque vague de drones avant l'épuisement de votre bouclier.
French.start: Touchez ou appuyez sur une touche pour décoller

German.ariaGame: Voidshot, Arena-Shooter. Steuere deine Drohne zum Mauszeiger; die Geschütze zielen und feuern von selbst. Räume jede Drohnenwelle, bevor dein Schild erschöpft ist.
German.start: Tippen oder beliebige Taste zum Starten

Russian.ariaGame: Voidshot, арена-шутер. Веди дрон к курсору; пушки наводятся и стреляют сами. Уничтожь каждую волну дронов, пока не иссяк щит.
Russian.start: Нажмите или любую клавишу для старта

Japanese.ariaGame: Voidshot アリーナシューター。カーソルに向けてドローンを操縦しよう。砲台は自動で照準して発射します。シールドが尽きる前にすべてのドローンの波を撃退しよう。
Japanese.start: タップまたは任意のキーで発進
Japanese.announceWave: ウェーブ {n}：ドローン {count} 機が接近中
Japanese.announceWin: 認証済み。すべてのウェーブを撃退しました。
Japanese.announceLose: シールドが尽きました。ラウンド終了。

Korean.ariaGame: Voidshot 아레나 슈터. 커서를 향해 드론을 조종하세요. 포탑이 자동으로 조준하고 발사합니다. 실드가 바닥나기 전에 모든 드론 웨이브를 처치하세요.

Indonesian.ariaGame: Voidshot, penembak arena. Kemudikan dronmu ke arah kursor; meriam membidik dan menembak otomatis. Bersihkan setiap gelombang dron sebelum perisaimu habis.
Indonesian.start: Ketuk atau tekan tombol apa saja untuk meluncur
